eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Travis, TX; at 03:40 PM ON MAY 17, 2026 Effective until 07:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Travis County Sheriff's Office: Law Enforcement activity in Manor, TX area between US 290, Old Kimbro Rd, Gregg Manor Rd, Bois-D-Arc Rd STAY indoors until further notice.
